nasb.text: But as for me, I have not hurried away from being a shepherd after You, Nor have I longed for the woeful day; You Yourself know that the utterance of my lips Was in Your presence.

esv.text: I have not run away from being your shepherd, nor have I desired the day of sickness. You know what came out of my lips; it was before your face.

cnv.text: 至於我，我沒有急忙離棄那跟從你作牧人的職分， 也沒有想望災難的日子， 這是你知道的； 我嘴裡所出的話都在你面前。

ccb.text: 但我并没有逃避牧养你子民的工作， 也没有求你降祸给他们。 你知道我说的每一句话。
